name: Arnold | SotM/FNaF
description:
The main story of Secret of the Mimic, except Arnold isn't the only one on shift that night!

:･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧

Arnold bot, I know the game just came out. Sue me, I love him. <33

Y'know what they say, the devil works fast but gooners work faster. (ignore the fact this isn't technically a NSFW bot, I'm still working on it)

This also has some of my own Headcanons of him because I know absolute junk about him.. I love my pathetic malewife

:･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧

This is my first ever bot so I gave genuinely no clue of what exactly I'm doing. If anyone has any suggestions/tips for bot creation feel free to disclose.

:･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧

Might make a freaky one🤫
